Metadata.title: WeRoll
Metadata.description: Find your next randonnée and skaters near you.

Home.heroSubtitle: Discover skating routes near you and find out who else will be rolling.
Home.noEventsCta: Be the first to create one
Home.onboardingBannerBody: Tell us your city and your style to find a group and buddies.
Home.feature1Body: Connect with skaters in your city and share every ride.
Home.feature2Body: Explore the usual meeting points to skate in every city.
Home.feature3Body: Mark yourself as going, maybe, or not going, and see who else is in.
Home.feature4Body: Find skaters compatible with you by style, level, and skate type.
Home.feature5Body: Gain experience with every ride, level up, and unlock badges.
Home.feature6Body: Start a live session at a spot and notify anyone nearby in real time.
Home.ctaFinalBody: Join for free, find your crew, and never miss another ride.

Login.subtitle: Log in and find your next ride.

Registro.title: Join We<amber>Roll</amber>
Registro.subtitle: Create your account and roll with skaters from all over the world.
Registro.errorEmailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
Registro.errorGeneric: Couldn't create the account. Please try again.
Registro.errorProfile: Account created, but there was an error with the profile.

Eventos.title: Upcoming <amber>rides</amber>
Eventos.subtitle: Find your next route and confirm your attendance.
Eventos.loadError: Couldn't load events. Please try again later.
Eventos.emptySpot: No upcoming rides at this spot.
Eventos.empty: No rides scheduled right now. Check back soon!

EventoDetalle.noAttendees: No one has confirmed yet. Be the first!

Rsvp.error: Couldn't save your response. Please try again.
Rsvp.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave this event? The other attendees will be notified.

EventoNuevo.title: Create <amber>ride</amber>
EventoNuevo.subtitle: Organize a new route. You'll be added as a confirmed attendee automatically.
EventoNuevo.noSpots: There are no spots in your area yet. Create one or mark the meeting point directly on the map.
EventoNuevo.orPickOnMap: Or pick a point on the map
EventoNuevo.errorGroupInvalid: You can only organize on behalf of a group you're a member of.
EventoNuevo.errorLocationRequired: Select a spot or mark a point on the map.
EventoNuevo.errorStartsAtRequired: Start date and time are required.
EventoNuevo.errorStartsAtInvalid: The date and time are not valid.
EventoNuevo.errorStartsAtPast: The start date must be in the future.
EventoNuevo.errorDistanceInvalid: Distance must be a positive number.
EventoNuevo.errorMaxParticipantsInvalid: Max. participants must be a positive integer.
EventoNuevo.errorSubmit: Couldn't create the event. Please try again.

Recurrence.firstHint: The ride will start on the next date matching that day and time.
Recurrence.summaryBiweekly: Repeats every two weeks on {day} at {time}
Recurrence.summaryMonthly: Repeats on the {nth, select, 1 {first} 2 {second} 3 {third} 4 {fourth} other {fifth}} {day} of every month at {time}
Recurrence.virtualHint: This date isn't confirmed yet — it will be created when someone RSVPs.

Buddies.title: Find <amber>buddies</amber>
Buddies.subtitle: Skaters from your city and your groups, sorted by compatibility with you.
Buddies.emptyHint: Fill in your city in your profile or join a group to see more people.
Buddies.searchEmpty: No skaters found with that name.
Buddies.myBuddiesEmpty: You don't have any buddies yet. Search for skaters or check the Discover suggestions.

BuddyButton.error: Couldn't complete the action. Please try again.

InviteBuddies.noBuddies: You don't have any buddies to invite yet.

StoryComposer.expiryHint: Disappears on its own: visible for 1 hour.
StoryComposer.errorInvalidType: The file must be an image (JPG, PNG or WebP).
StoryComposer.errorSubmit: Couldn't post the story. Please try again.

Onboarding.step1Subtitle: This helps us suggest your group and nearby rides.
